game_name: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers: The Movie

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player must navigate as unmorphed character, learning basic movement
Dropped by enemies; mechanic teaches resource collection for power-up access
Main enemy type throughout levels 1-5; establishes combat rhythm

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Level 1 (after meter fills or boss encounter)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Cinematic transformation grants powered kick and signature weapon; triggers automatically at boss
Unlock special attack capability; weapon-specific strategy emerges
Heavy damage output; taught through boss encounters
Escalating difficulty; five distinct boss patterns before final confrontation
Novel pattern; tests accumulated player skill
Film antagonist; ultimate test requiring full mastery of morphing and special attacks

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting thunderbolt items to fill morphing meter
typical_tension_triggers: Civilian mode vulnerability (low health, no special weapon)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension between vulnerable civilian state and powered morphed state; players alternate between resource gathering and combat intensity; escalates through 7-level progression to final boss confrontation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible; introduces morphing mechanics and basic enemy patterns in civilian mode before first boss
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate difficulty; TV show season 2 monsters appear as bosses (levels 2-5); players master weapon-specific strategies
difficulty_curve.late_game: Significant spike; original game-exclusive boss (level 6) followed by film antagonist Ivan Ooze final boss requiring sustained morphed combat
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (forces first morphing demonstration)
Ivan Ooze final boss (ultimate test of morphing + special attack mastery)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level begins with character in civilian persona. Filling morphing meter via thunderbolt collection or reaching boss encounter triggers transformation. Morphed state grants powered kick and signature weapon with special attack capability.
Levels 1-5 feature monsters from Power Rangers season 2; each boss represents distinct encounter pattern. Level 6 breaks pattern with original game-exclusive boss design.
Thunderbolt items dropped by enemies fill morphing meter. Both morphed and unmorphed characters can use collected items for special attacks, but morphed form provides superior moveset.
